sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = (case when substring(GL,6,2) = '00' then 'Registered' else 'Estimate' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = substring(t.GL,1,3) + ' ' + m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Field1 and m.Table_ID = 'R62' and m.ID = 'GL' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = (case when substring(GL,6,2) = '00' then 'Registered' else 'Estimate' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = (case when substring(BusCat,1,1) in ('1','2') then 'Assumed' else 'Ceded' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, uwyr,PC, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
